failedAssertions.reason: top_logprobs: -1 (negative value) returns HTTP 200 instead of HTTP 400 — server does not validate negative top_logprobs values. Positive values (0, 1, 5) work correctly.

top_logprobs entries are NOT sorted in descending order by logprob (89/90 positions unsorted). Chosen token is NOT guaranteed to be first entry (76/90 positions). Entries appear in arbitrary/random order rather than highest-probability-first.
